headline: Dover (DOV) Launches OPW Diamond Platform For Fuel Distribution Control
summary: Dover (NYSE:DOV) subsidiary OPW Fluid Transfer Solutions has launched its Diamond Integrated Fueling Solution. The platform is designed to improve operational control, efficiency, and visibility for fuel distributors and delivery operators. Diamond combines multiple existing OPW technologies into a single integrated system for fuel distribution operations. Dover operates across several industrial technology and engineered systems markets, and OPW sits within that footprint as a specialist...
